CREATE TABLE dates_table (start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
SELECT datediff('day', start_date, end_date) AS days_diff FROM dates_table;
SELECT datediff('month', start_date, end_date) AS months_diff FROM dates_table WHERE start_date < DATE '2022-06-01';
SELECT start_date, end_date, datediff('year', start_date, end_date) AS years_diff FROM dates_table;
SELECT start_date, end_date, datediff('week', start_date, end_date) AS weeks_diff FROM dates_table WHERE start_date >= DATE '2021-01-01';
SELECT datediff('day', (SELECT min(start_date) FROM dates_table), end_date) AS gap_days FROM dates_table;
SELECT d1.start_date, d1.end_date, datediff('month', d1.start_date, d2.end_date) AS month_diff FROM dates_table d1 JOIN dates_table d2 ON d1.start_date < d2.end_date;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_diff FROM (SELECT datediff('day', start_date, end_date) FROM dates_table) AS temp WHERE temp.day_diff > 0;
SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, hd.holiday, datediff('day', d.start_date, hd.holiday) AS days_until_holiday FROM dates_table d JOIN holiday_dates hd ON d.end_date < hd.holiday;

SELECT d.start_date, d.end_date, hd.holiday, datediff('month', d.start_date, hd.holiday) AS months_until_holiday FROM dates_table d JOIN holiday_dates hd ON d.end_date < hd.holiday ORDER BY months_until_holiday DESC;
